## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes (offline, sub-second)
- [ ] `bash scripts/demo.sh` still shows v1 PASS and v2 FAIL with exit 1
- [ ] No new runtime dependency (or an issue discussing it is linked)
- [ ] Behavior changes come with a test
- [ ] No em dashes in docs or user-facing strings (house style)
